message:
refactor(extensions): extract QuickJsRuntime to dedicated module

Remove the QuickJsRuntime struct, its impl block (new, eval, eval_file,
run_pending_jobs, run_until_idle, install_pi_stub), and the
throw_unimplemented helper (~122 lines) from extensions_js.rs. These
have been moved to a dedicated quickjs_runtime module by a concurrent
agent, leaving extensions_js.rs focused on environment variable
filtering, the PiEventLoop, and JSON↔JS conversion utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
